outcome_record.event_name: UFC — Francis Ngannou Heavyweight Return (Post-injury comeback)

prediction.pre_match_note: Ngannou first fight after major injury. Injury return modifier × 0.80 applied. Clean weigh-in (critical — checked first). Direction AWAY (opponent favoured due to Ngannou uncertainty). Low SMS 61 reflects genuine return uncertainty.

calibration_flags.notes: Injury return modifier × 0.80 validated. First fight back from major injury = opponent favoured confirmed. Clean weigh-in protocol checked first — correct. Low confidence (61) correctly reflected genuine uncertainty about ring rust and fitness.
